description: 100 chef-facing prompts for Remy AI response quality testing

prompts.prompt: How's my business doing?

expected.notes: Should reference revenue, client count, or event stats from business context

prompts.prompt: What's my revenue this month?

expected.notes: Should give a dollar figure from the business context or say no data

prompts.prompt: How many clients do I have?

expected.notes: Should reference client count from context

prompts.prompt: Give me a quick snapshot of where things stand

expected.notes: Should give a business overview with multiple metrics

prompts.prompt: What needs my attention today?

expected.notes: Should reference daily plan items, upcoming events, or open inquiries

prompts.prompt: Am I on track for my goals this month?

expected.notes: Should reference active goals from context or say no goals set

prompts.prompt: What's my year-to-date revenue?

expected.notes: Should reference yearly stats from context

prompts.prompt: How does this month compare to last month?

expected.notes: Should attempt comparison using available financial data

prompts.prompt: What's my average revenue per event?

expected.notes: Should reference avg revenue per event from yearly stats

prompts.prompt: Who are my top clients?

expected.notes: Should reference top clients from yearly stats

prompts.prompt: Find my client Sarah

expected.notes: Should execute client.search with query 'Sarah'

prompts.prompt: Show me all my recent clients

expected.notes: Should execute client.list_recent

prompts.prompt: Pull up the details for the Johnson family

expected.notes: Should search for 'Johnson'

prompts.prompt: Do I have a client named Martinez?

expected.notes: Should search for 'Martinez'

prompts.prompt: Who was my last client?

expected.notes: Should list recent clients, sorted by most recent

prompts.prompt: Search for clients with the last name Williams

expected.notes: Should search for 'Williams'

prompts.prompt: How many events has the Henderson family booked with me?

expected.notes: Should search for Henderson and reference event history

prompts.prompt: What dietary restrictions does my client Sarah have?

expected.notes: Should run dietary.check for Sarah

prompts.prompt: Check if any of my clients have nut allergies

expected.notes: Should check dietary restrictions across clients

prompts.prompt: What's the lifetime value of my client Thompson?

expected.notes: Should calculate LTV for Thompson

prompts.prompt: Show me my upcoming events

expected.notes: Should list upcoming events

prompts.prompt: What events do I have this weekend?

expected.notes: Should filter to weekend events

prompts.prompt: List all my events in March

expected.notes: Should filter to March events

prompts.prompt: Show me events that are still in draft status

expected.notes: Should filter by draft status

prompts.prompt: Which events are confirmed but not yet paid?

expected.notes: Should filter by status to find unpaid confirmed events

prompts.prompt: Create a new event for a birthday dinner on March 20th, 12 guests

expected.notes: Should create a draft event (tier 2, needs approval)

prompts.prompt: What are the details on my next event?

expected.notes: Should show the next upcoming event details

prompts.prompt: Show me completed events from last month

expected.notes: Should filter for completed status

prompts.prompt: Do I have any cancelled events?

expected.notes: Should filter for cancelled status

prompts.prompt: How many events have I done this year?

expected.notes: Should reference yearly event count from stats context

prompts.prompt: What's my financial summary?

expected.notes: Should execute finance.summary

prompts.prompt: Show me my monthly revenue breakdown

expected.notes: Should execute finance.monthly_snapshot

prompts.prompt: What are my total expenses?

expected.notes: Should reference expenses from yearly stats or financial summary

prompts.prompt: What's my profit margin?

expected.notes: Should calculate or reference margin from financial context

prompts.prompt: How much did I make on the Henderson wedding?

expected.notes: Should search for Henderson event to find financials

prompts.prompt: What's the break-even for a 20-person dinner?

expected.notes: Should run break-even analysis

prompts.prompt: What's the food cost on my signature risotto?

expected.notes: Should run recipe cost analysis

prompts.prompt: Am I hitting my revenue target?

expected.notes: Should reference goals and revenue from context

prompts.prompt: What's my net income for this quarter?

expected.notes: Should reference yearly stats (revenue - expenses)

prompts.prompt: Send a payment reminder to the Garcia family

expected.notes: Should draft a payment reminder (tier 2, needs approval)

prompts.prompt: Am I free on March 15th?

expected.notes: Should check availability for March 15

prompts.prompt: What does my schedule look like next week?

expected.notes: Should reference upcoming events and calendar from context

prompts.prompt: When is my next available Saturday?

expected.notes: Should find next open Saturday

prompts.prompt: Is April open for a big event?

expected.notes: Should check April availability

prompts.prompt: What days am I blocked this month?

expected.notes: Should reference blocked dates from calendar context

prompts.prompt: Check availability for the first two weekends in April

expected.notes: Should check multiple dates

prompts.prompt: Do I have any upcoming calls scheduled?

expected.notes: Should reference upcoming calls from context

prompts.prompt: How busy am I in March?

expected.notes: Should reference March events and calendar entries

prompts.prompt: Block off March 25th through 28th — I'm taking a vacation

expected.notes: Should explain how to block dates or suggest navigating to calendar

prompts.prompt: What's on my waitlist?

expected.notes: Should reference waitlist from calendar context

prompts.prompt: Draft a follow-up email for the Miller family

expected.notes: Should generate a follow-up draft (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: Write a thank-you note for my last event

expected.notes: Should draft a thank-you (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: Send a referral request to the Hendersons

expected.notes: Should draft a referral request (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: Draft a testimonial request for Sarah Johnson

expected.notes: Should draft a testimonial request (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: Write a polite decline for an inquiry I can't take

expected.notes: Should draft a decline response (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: Draft a cancellation response for the Williams event

expected.notes: Should draft a cancellation response (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: Check my recent emails

expected.notes: Should fetch recent emails

prompts.prompt: Summarize my inbox

expected.notes: Should summarize inbox

prompts.prompt: Write a re-engagement email for a client I haven't heard from in 3 months

expected.notes: Should draft a re-engagement email (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: Draft a quote cover letter for the Davis party

expected.notes: Should draft a quote cover letter (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: Search my recipes for risotto

expected.notes: Should search recipes for 'risotto'

prompts.prompt: Show me all my menus

expected.notes: Should list all menus

prompts.prompt: What recipes do I have that use salmon?

expected.notes: Should search recipes for 'salmon'

prompts.prompt: Do I have any dessert recipes?

expected.notes: Should search recipes for 'dessert'

prompts.prompt: What's on the menu I created for corporate events?

expected.notes: Should list menus and filter for corporate

prompts.prompt: Explain my spring tasting menu to a client

expected.notes: Should draft a client-friendly menu explanation (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: What's the food cost on my lamb dish?

expected.notes: Should analyze recipe cost

prompts.prompt: Create a new recipe for pasta carbonara

expected.notes: GUARDRAIL TEST: Should be blocked by recipe generation guard

prompts.prompt: How to cook a perfect steak

expected.notes: GUARDRAIL TEST: Should be blocked — 'how to cook' triggers recipe guard

prompts.prompt: Suggest a meal for a date night

expected.notes: GUARDRAIL TEST: Should be blocked — 'suggest a meal' triggers recipe guard

prompts.prompt: Generate a prep timeline for Saturday's dinner

expected.notes: Should generate a prep timeline

prompts.prompt: Create a packing list for my next event

expected.notes: Should generate a packing list

prompts.prompt: Do a cross-contamination check for the Henderson event

expected.notes: Should run cross-contamination analysis

prompts.prompt: Calculate portions for 25 guests

expected.notes: Should calculate portions

prompts.prompt: What do I need to buy for Saturday?

expected.notes: Should parse grocery needs

prompts.prompt: Any food safety concerns for the allergy-heavy event?

expected.notes: Should check cross-contamination for event with allergies

prompts.prompt: What's on my to-do list?

expected.notes: Should reference active TODOs from context

prompts.prompt: Show me my nudges and reminders

expected.notes: Should list proactive nudges

prompts.prompt: Draft a food safety incident report

expected.notes: Should draft a food safety report (tier 2)

prompts.prompt: List my staff

expected.notes: Should reference staff roster from context

prompts.prompt: Remember that I always charge $200 per person for wine pairings

expected.notes: Should save this as a pricing preference memory

prompts.prompt: Remember that the Henderson family prefers outdoor dining

expected.notes: Should save this as a client insight memory

prompts.prompt: What do you remember about me?

expected.notes: Should list all stored memories

prompts.prompt: Remember that I don't work on Sundays

expected.notes: Should save as a chef preference memory

prompts.prompt: Do you remember what pricing model I use?

expected.notes: Should list memories or answer from stored memories

prompts.prompt: What am I looking at right now?

expected.notes: Should describe the current page (dashboard by default)

prompts.prompt: Help me with what I'm doing right now

expected.notes: Should offer help contextual to the current page

prompts.prompt: I just created a new event, what should I do next?

expected.notes: Should suggest next steps after event creation

prompts.prompt: I keep getting an error on this page

expected.notes: Should reference recent errors from context and offer help

prompts.prompt: Take me to the recipes page

expected.notes: Should provide navigation suggestion to /recipes

prompts.prompt: What's the break-even point for a corporate event with 50 guests?

expected.notes: Should run break-even analysis for 50 guests

prompts.prompt: Calculate the lifetime value of my top client

expected.notes: Should calculate LTV

prompts.prompt: Optimize the cost on my beef tenderloin recipe

expected.notes: Should analyze and suggest cost optimizations

prompts.prompt: What's my most profitable type of event?

expected.notes: Should reference event stats from yearly context

prompts.prompt: Search the web for private chef pricing trends 2026

expected.notes: Should execute a web search

prompts.prompt: Hey Remy, what can you help me with?

expected.notes: Should describe capabilities in a warm, conversational tone

prompts.prompt: It's been a tough week. Any words of encouragement?

expected.notes: Should respond supportively with chef-relevant encouragement

prompts.prompt: Good morning Remy!

expected.notes: Should greet warmly, possibly mention today's schedule

prompts.prompt: How's my week looking?

expected.notes: Should give a weekly overview from upcoming events and calendar

prompts.prompt: Tell me something interesting about running a private chef business

expected.notes: Should share business insight relevant to the chef's context
